_comment: Repo-scoped Claude Code hooks. Pairs with .husky/pre-commit (the git-level enforcement). These hooks fire INSIDE Claude Code before/after tool use; the git hook fires at commit time. Both must agree.

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -E "git\s+push.*--force.*\b(main|master)\b" >/dev/null; then echo "BLOCKED: force-push to main is forbidden (AGENTS.md §7)." >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -E "--no-verify\b" >/dev/null; then echo "BLOCKED: --no-verify is forbidden (AGENTS.md §7 / §13)." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'path="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$path" in *docs/decisions/*.md) if [ -f "$path" ] && grep -E "^status:\s*accepted" "$path" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BLOCKED: $path has status: accepted — ADRs are append-only (AGENTS.md §7)." >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0'
bash -c 'if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo "REMINDER: working tree dirty — update .omc/STATUS.md before ending the session (AGENTS.md §5)."; fi'
